lorebook.name: The Stopped City
lorebook.description: Glimpse World lorebook for The Stopped City — part of The Endless

entries.name: [Location] Glimpse World — The Stopped City
entries.content: The Stopped City is a Glimpse World that presents as a large urban environment frozen at what appears to be mid-morning. Food sits on restaurant tables at the temperature it was served. Vehicles are mid-turn at intersections. Shop doors are mid-swing. Everything is precisely where it would be in an ordinary morning in an ordinary city — except there are no people. No bodies. No blood. No signs of evacuation, panic, struggle, or disaster. The city did not empty. It simply stopped containing people at some point, with everything else continuing to exist exactly as it was the moment before. The food on the tables does not rot. The vehicles do not rust. Nothing in The Stopped City decays or changes. Travelers can walk through it, sit in the chairs, pick up objects. Everything is functional. The city is simply absent of the people it was built for, and gives no indication of where they went or whether they are coming back.
